FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct FocusVisualStyle

Namespace
FluentGpu.Render
Assembly
FluentGpu.Render.dll

The focus-visual brushes (WinUI FocusStrokeColorOuter/Inner + thickness). Passed into the recorder by the host (which reads the theme); default = disabled, so the headless/test paths can opt in.

public readonly record struct FocusVisualStyle : IEquatable<FocusVisualStyle>
Implements
IEquatable<FocusVisualStyle>

Constructors

FocusVisualStyle(ColorF, ColorF, float)

The focus-visual brushes (WinUI FocusStrokeColorOuter/Inner + thickness). Passed into the recorder by the host (which reads the theme); default = disabled, so the headless/test paths can opt in.

public FocusVisualStyle(ColorF Outer, ColorF Inner, float Thickness)

Outer ColorF
Inner ColorF
Thickness float

float
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
